name: Wanpy Dog Treats – Chicken Skewers 100g
description: Formulated for both puppies and adult dogs, Wanpy Chicken Skewers help support the 5 Signs of Good Health, including healthy skin and coat, strong bones and teeth, digestive health, strong muscles, and a healthy immune system. The carefully balanced blend of Omega 6 and zinc helps maintain healthier skin and promotes a shinier, softer coat. With its protein-rich recipe and nutritious ingredients, Wanpy Chicken Skewers provide energy and essential nutrients to help keep your dog active, healthy, and happy every day. Key Benefits Complete and balanced food for dogs Made with high-quality ingredients Rich in protein for muscle support Supports healthy skin and a shiny coat Helps maintain strong bones and teeth Promotes digestive health and immunity Suitable for puppies and adult dogs Enriched with Omega 6 and zinc Storage Instructions Store in a cool and dry place.
